topIngredients.name: Coconut Oil (Cocos Nucifera)
topIngredients.benefit: Deeply penetrating oil that hydrates and repairs dry skin

topIngredients.name: Green Coffee Extract
topIngredients.benefit: Antioxidant-rich extract that may firm skin over time

topIngredients.name: Shea Butter
topIngredients.benefit: Intensive moisturizer for rough patches and elbows

verdict: Palmer's Coconut Oil body lotion provides effective deep hydration with a pleasant tropical scent. The green coffee firming claim is modest but the moisturizing performance is solid for the price point.
